text.message: Sry. I didnt wanna solo anyone

All good, that was my fault
i will trade it dont worry
because all my ore will make me fast cities

i half my production you dont
Literally 10 and 11 wheat means the same as 6 wheat, count the dots lol
Only thing he’s saying is I have no chance lol
what do you mean you are doing same as me
My setup is the worst by far and I’ve been robbed 4 times
I’m out the game so I’m just gonna solo blue all game
Red we will feed u road, why are u saying youre dead?
He kept robbing me. Stole from me when I had 1 card and blue had 6 lol
Bro he needed a brick, that's part of the game lol
Could have asked for nb or ns
Some people dont know that part of the game
Red can u take wheat port?
U have a game here, dont throw. Just ruining it for the rest of the table too cause black rolls us
Games cooked, y’all should have been blocking the 8
Now you want me to stop black lol
Were asking u to not throw the game lmao
Not sure why I’d help u win
Sorry if I got you mad red it wasn't my intention
If you haven’t robbed me once that means blue has robbed me 4 times lol
This is something funny lol. The table would feed u road to stop black, u have double port, and youre crying saying your game is done...
Funny you think blue is gonna let me get road lol
Anyways, he robbed me 4 times when I have the worst setup. Gonna make sure he doesn’t win
Id give u road mats, but ig throw youre own game lol
Okay, well you've ruined my game cause doing so gives black win
Lmao my game has been thrown
U and blue are no different. He threw your game, and you thre mine, well done
You’re still actively throwing your game
i wan in a table that the player who won got double plowed and had no ore
Should I solo him again? Where should I block??
Talking about getting me road and then blocking the 4
It was on the 8 sheep, and I rolled 7, so i hit 4 brick. What a victim mentality
i like that everyone points 1 player when clearly its anyones game
Black it is lmfao, that's why its so funny
Red is non stop crying when its a close game for everyone
like green has the best city mats potential road now and a non knight
I have knights, just forgot to play cause im typing lol
The world is out together u
You forgot to play cos you high af?
I love how red is complaining and is in the lead lol
If you think I’m in the lead that tells me all I need to know
Double port, 4 points, 2 device, and still crying about your game is thrown lol
No yeah I’m actually in the lead
Notice im actually in last, but im not throwing a temper tantrum
has been at least 3 times by me
Exactly. Honestly I will do what it takes to make red lose at this point. What a baby
Green got nothing to complain about he’s just bad
I got robbed 4x in a row by the same person when I was I. Last
That’s what I was complaining about lol

I was coming at blue and you interjected talking about in killing your game lol
well i like to read your writings
Yes, cause solo blue let's black stomp everyone
My point has been proven so much
U are such a baby I would rather just hit u rest of game and make sure u take this L
Now that you’re losing youre doing exactly what you were complaining about
I cant let babies get there way
Anyway u don’t have to try, my game was already over when blue robbed me 4x in a row
Or else they'll always act out
I just think it’s funny you were wining about your game being over
When I didn’t even have to do anything
